title: Tasty Toasted Canadian Shrimp Skewers
description: A nutty and crunchy Canadian dish featuring saeujeot shrimp paste and coconut cream crack, made with low glycemic friendly ingredients. This show-off dish is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together saeujeot shrimp paste, coconut cream, granulated sweetener, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and sprinkle with chopped macadamia nuts.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
